props.ChoiceText: You brought wagons through bad country where your bow had to warn, deter, and kill before blades ever came close.
props.ChoiceBio: Escort duty taught you that an archer's real work is often done before the enemy believes the fight has begun.

0.TransitionText: Because escort duty taught you that an archer's real work is often done before the enemy believes the fight has begun, bow, distance, and patience remained the shape of your life.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Archer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because escort duty taught you that an archer's real work is often done before the enemy believes the fight has begun, reputation and good judgment taught you to trade your skill.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Merchant, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because escort duty taught you that an archer's real work is often done before the enemy believes the fight has begun, distance stopped feeling threatening and began to feel like invitation.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Explorer, but you may remain on your current path instead.
